name: image_edit
description: Edit or transform an existing image based on a text prompt. Use for image-to-image generation, style transfer, background replacement, or any modification that requires a reference image.

image_path.description: Reference image to edit. Accepts: URL (http/https), workspace:// URI, or attach:// URI.

prompt.description: Text description of the desired edit or transformation to apply to the reference image.

provider.description: Provider connector ID (use image_providers with capability='image_editing' to list). If omitted, the first available image editing provider is used.

model.description: Model name to use. Overrides the provider's default model. If omitted, the provider's default model is used.
